faq.question: <p>Does the Off Center Split bulkhead offer the same features as the standard Bifold?</p>
faq.answer: Yes, the only difference is that&nbsp;the hinge is placed at the 2/3 area of the width.
faq.catdescription: Off Center Split 1/3 - 2/3 for ITW Insulated Products

faq.question: <p>What color vinyl is standard?</p>
faq.answer: <p>Normally Blue Vinyl but other colors are available possibly at a longer lead time</p>
faq.catdescription: Off Center Split 1/3 - 2/3 for ITW Insulated Products

faq.question: <p>Can the options of a Fan, Vent or Logistic straps be added?</p>
faq.answer: <p>Yes, any of the options can be added to the Off Center Split Bulkhead.</p>
faq.catdescription: Off Center Split 1/3 - 2/3 for ITW Insulated Products

faq.question: <p>How thick is the Off Center Split bulkhead?</p>
faq.answer: <p>It is 3 inches thick the same as the Bifold version.</p>
faq.catdescription: Off Center Split 1/3 - 2/3 for ITW Insulated Products

faq.question: <p>Can I have the smaller 1/3 section placed on either side of the bulkhead?</p>
faq.answer: <p>Yes, you can request it to be either roadside (left) or curbside (right)</p>
faq.catdescription: Off Center Split 1/3 - 2/3 for ITW Insulated Products
